Date: The date the data was recorded. This can help track the changes in the number and geographical distribution of partnerships over time.
Total_Partnerships: The total number of regional partnerships Elexion Automotive maintains for second-life battery deployment or recycling. This gives an overview of the company's efforts in recycling and repurposing end-of-life EV batteries.
US_Partnerships: The number of partnerships Elexion Automotive maintains in the US for second-life battery deployment or recycling. This provides insights into the company's recycling efforts in the US market.
Canada_Partnerships: The number of partnerships Elexion Automotive maintains in Canada for second-life battery deployment or recycling. This provides insights into the company's recycling efforts in the Canadian market.
Annual_Units: The approximate number of end-of-life EV batteries handled annually through these partnerships. This gives an idea of the scale of Elexion's recycling and repurposing efforts.
